---
title: "glomeruli"
output: github_document
---

```{r bodyclocks_setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
source(file.path("..", "R", "io_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "annotation_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "biomart_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "string_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "validation_utils.R"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "tables"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "reports"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "mouse"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "baboon"))
```


## Load libraries

```{r libraries, message=FALSE}
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(mouse4302.db)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rain)
library(genefilter)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(STRINGdb)
library(biomaRt)
```

## Load data

```{r load_data}
dat <- read.csv("data/raw/gloms_full.csv")
# remove rows with empty values like ""
dat <- dat[!apply(dat == "", 1, any), ]
# set CycID as row names and remove the CycID column
rownames(dat) <- dat$CycID
dat <- dat[, -which(names(dat) == "CycID")]

```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
# RAIN circadian analysis

gloms <- dat[, c(18:41)]
gloms <- gloms %>%
   dplyr::filter(rowMeans(.) >= 50)

gloms_RAIN <- rain(t(gloms), deltat=4, period=24, measure.sequence = c(2,2,2,2,2,2,2,2,2,2,2,2),
                peak.border=c(0.3, 0.7), method = "independent" , adjp.method='ABH', verbose=TRUE) # independent for mouse sampling,

p_values_gloms <- gloms_RAIN$pVal

gloms_RAIN$BH.Q <- p.adjust(p_values_gloms, method = "BH")


# Adjust phase: first sample is CT3, not CT0
gloms_RAIN$phase <- (gloms_RAIN$phase + 3) %% 24

gloms_circ <- merge(gloms, gloms_RAIN, by = 0, all.x = TRUE)

# Remove .xx from the Row.names column
gloms_circ$Row.names <- gsub("\\..*", "", gloms_circ$Row.names)


# Set up the Ensembl BioMart connection
ensembl <- connect_biomart("mmusculus_gene_ensembl")

# Query Ensembl BioMart to get gene descriptions
gene_info <- get_biomart_annotation(
  ids = gloms_circ$Row.names,
  mart = ensembl,
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol", "external_gene_name", "description"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  cache_key = "glomeruli_gene_info"
)

# Prioritize MGI symbols, fall back to external_gene_name only if needed
gene_info <- gene_info %>%
  mutate(preferred_symbol = ifelse(!is.na(mgi_symbol) & mgi_symbol != "", 
                                  mgi_symbol, 
                                  external_gene_name))

# Ensure unique entries in gene_info
gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$external_gene_name), ]

# Remove text within square brackets, including the brackets themselves
gene_info$description <- gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", gene_info$description)

# Trim any trailing whitespace that might be left
gene_info$description <- trimws(gene_info$description)

merged <- merge(gloms_circ, gene_info, by.x = "Row.names", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)
write.csv(merged, file = "results/tables/gloms_circ.csv")
```


```{r prepare_string_nodes}
# Get STRING DB interaction data and functional enrichment

nodes_data <- merged %>%
    filter(BH.Q <= 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol)


# Get list of gene symbols for STRING API
#gene_list <- nodes_data$symbol

# ENSEMBL gene IDs return more results than MGI symbols
gene_list <- nodes_data$Row.names
enrichment_background_genes <- unique(gsub("\\..*", "", rownames(gloms)))
```


```{r prepare_gene_mapping}
# Create comprehensive gene mapping dictionary
gene_mapping <- create_gene_mapping(
  gene_ids = merged$Row.names,
  symbols = nodes_data$symbol
)

cat("Created mapping for", length(gene_mapping), "genes\n")
```


```{r build_string_network}
# Get protein-protein interactions and enrichment data using STRINGdb

enrichment_backgrounds <- get_string_enrichment_backgrounds(
  foreground_genes = gene_list,
  tested_genes = enrichment_background_genes,
  species_id = 10090
)

network_bundle <- get_string_network_bundle(
  gene_list = gene_list,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  species_id = 10090,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  include_enrichment = FALSE
)
edges <- network_bundle$edges_by_threshold
cluster_data <- enrichment_backgrounds$backgrounds$all_string$cluster_data


phase_colors <- c("3" = "orange", "7" = "yellow", "11" = "red", "15" = "purple", "19" = "navy", "23" = "lightblue")

network_outputs <- build_string_network_outputs(
  cluster_data = cluster_data,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  gene_info = gene_info,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  phase_colors = phase_colors)
enrichment_background_bundle <- build_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
  enrichment_backgrounds, nodes_data, gene_info, gene_mapping, phase_colors
)

cluster_data <- network_outputs$cluster_data
nodes <- network_outputs$nodes
nodes_with_tooltips <- network_outputs$nodes_with_tooltips
cluster_for_plot <- network_outputs$cluster_for_plot
cluster_descriptions <- network_outputs$cluster_descriptions

save_string_network_outputs(
  outputs = network_outputs,
  edges = edges,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/gloms",
  prefix = "gloms"
)
save_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
  enrichment_background_bundle,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/gloms",
  prefix = "gloms"
)

```


```{r compute_amplitude_display_table}
# Process data frame for plotting in bodyclocks shiny app
df <- subset(merged, select = -c(Row.names, pVal, phase, peak.shape, period, BH.Q, external_gene_name, description, preferred_symbol))
col_names2 <- c("01", "01", "02", "02", "03", "03", "04", "04", "05", "05", "06", "06", "07", "07", "08", "08", "09", "09", "10", "10", "11", "11", "12", "12","Gene")
colnames(df) <- col_names2
data <- pivot_longer(df, cols = !Gene, names_to = "time_point", values_to = "reads")

qval_df <- merged[c("mgi_symbol", "BH.Q")]
new_pval_names <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")
colnames(qval_df) <- new_pval_names

data <- data[order(data$time_point),]

mean_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, mean)
sd_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, sd)
mean_sd <- merge(mean_data, sd_data, by = c("Gene", "time_point"))
names <- c("Gene", "time_point", "mean", "sd")
colnames(mean_sd) <- names
mean_sd <- inner_join(mean_sd, qval_df, by = "Gene")
save_rds_checked(mean_sd, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/gloms/gloms_data.rds")

# Prepare data frame for display

dt <- merged %>%
  mutate(ZT3 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("CT3_9am_1", "CT3_9am_2", "CT27_9am_1", "CT27_9am_2"))),
         ZT7 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("CT7_1pm_1", "CT7_1pm_2", "CT31_1pm_1", "CT31_1pm_2"))),
         ZT11 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("CT11_5pm_1", "CT11_5pm_2", "CT35_5pm_1", "CT35_5pm_2"))),
         ZT15 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("CT15_9pm_1", "CT15_9pm_2", "CT39_9pm_1", "CT39_9pm_2"))),
         ZT19 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("CT19_1am_1", "CT19_1am_2", "CT43_1am_1", "CT43_1am_2"))),
         ZT23 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("CT23_5am_1", "CT23_5am_2", "CT47_5am_1", "CT47_5am_2")))
  )

means <- dt[c("ZT3", "ZT7", "ZT11", "ZT15", "ZT19", "ZT23")]

min_val <- apply(means, 1, min)
max_val <- apply(means, 1, max)

Amp_fc_log2 <- log2(max_val / min_val)
Amp_fc <- max_val / min_val

dt <- cbind(dt, Amp_fc_log2, Amp_fc)


display_dt <- dt %>%
  dplyr::select(mgi_symbol, description, pVal, BH.Q, Amp_fc_log2, phase) %>%
  dplyr::rename(symbol = mgi_symbol) %>%
  arrange(BH.Q)

save_rds_checked(display_dt, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/gloms/gloms_display_dt.rds")
```
